title: Working With a Registered Psychotherapist in Ontario
excerpt: What it means to work with an RP — confidentiality, consent, and professional boundaries.
author: Nayab Tahir
body:
When you work with a **Registered Psychotherapist (RP)** in Ontario, you can expect care that follows professional ethical and clinical standards — including informed consent, confidentiality, and respect for your autonomy.

Therapy is collaborative: you control the pace, focus, and depth of sessions. Boundaries exist to protect your safety and the integrity of the therapeutic relationship.

If you are exploring whether psychotherapy is right for you, a brief consultation can help clarify fit, jurisdiction, and next steps — without obligation.
